series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Venereal Disease Register Card (1238-01D and 1238-05D)
series_metadata.series_description: Report maintain information on sysphilis cases (confirmed cases)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: patient is: A) or older without up-date in 5 years. B) 40-49 years or older without update in 10 years. C) no age without up-date in 10 years. D) entered as "no name"
